Contract: build-ready-idea-1
Domain: Small-team CRM with contacts, notes, and follow-up tracking
Entity Customer: primary record in client state
Behaviours: Add contact, Search contact, Add note to contact, Follow-up status, Open follow-up count
Frontend: React + Vite SPA with Customers feature route
Verification: UVL 6/6; runtime 11/11
Known limitations:
- MVP uses universal CRUD shell — advanced pipeline stages may be simplified
- Notes and follow-up status depend on generated feature module patterns
- No server-side persistence or multi-user collaboration in MVP
